global_style._note: MANDATORY — append to EVERY background and floating element prompt. Non-negotiable render style for all BUILT thumbnails.
global_style.render_style: semi-realistic cinematic concept art, premium animated film keyframe aesthetic, 2.5D digital painting with volumetric depth, painterly backgrounds with sharp focal subject
global_style.render_style_negative: NOT photorealistic, NOT fully 3D rendered, NOT cartoon, NOT anime, NOT sketch style
global_style.background_color: exactly #0A0E1A midnight navy — not dark grey, not dark teal, not dark green — precisely midnight navy with subtle deep blue undertone
global_style.bokeh: mandatory heavy bokeh filling 5% of background, large soft circular light orbs, warm amber bokeh (#FFB347) mixed with cool teal bokeh (#4A9EFF), prominent not subtle — absent bokeh is a defect
global_style.lighting: two light sources: (1) warm amber practical lamp rear-left at 30-45 degree angle, (2) cool cyan tech/screen glow from subject front-center at 40% intensity. Global cinematic teal-and-orange color grade. Subtle blue LED edge glow at 30% opacity on subject silhouette.
global_style.color_balance: Midnight #0A0E1A dominant 70%, Signal Cyan #00E5CC and Electric Coral #FF6B4A as surgical accent points only 10% combined, matte surfaces not glossy
global_style.quality: 16:9 aspect ratio, high detail on subject, atmospheric depth
global_style.prompt_block: semi-realistic cinematic concept art, premium animated film keyframe aesthetic, 2.5D digital painting with volumetric depth, painterly background with sharp focal subject, exactly #0A0E1A midnight navy background (not dark grey, not dark teal), mandatory prominent bokeh: large soft circular amber (#FFB347) and teal (#4A9EFF) light orbs filling background, warm amber practical lamp rear-left 30-45 degree, cool cyan screen glow front-center 40% intensity, global cinematic teal-and-orange color grade, subtle blue LED edge glow 30% opacity on silhouette edges, matte surfaces not glossy, Signal Cyan #00E5CC and Electric Coral #FF6B4A as surgical accent points only, atmospheric depth

brand.prompt_suffix: semi-realistic cinematic concept art, premium animated film keyframe aesthetic, 2.5D digital painting with volumetric depth, painterly background with sharp focal subject, exactly #0A0E1A midnight navy background, mandatory prominent bokeh filling background: large soft circular warm amber (#FFB347) and cool teal (#4A9EFF) light orbs, warm amber practical lamp rear-left 30-45 degree angle, cool cyan screen glow front-center 40% intensity, global cinematic teal-and-orange color grade, subtle blue LED edge glow 30% opacity on silhouette, matte surfaces not glossy, professional and sovereign mood, high-end editorial quality, atmospheric depth, no neon colors, no bright white backgrounds, no stock photo aesthetic
brand.negative_keywords: Negative: photorealistic, fully 3D rendered, cartoon, anime, sketch style, neon colors, pure white background, dark grey background, dark teal background, pure black background, stock photo, emoji, clip-art, gaming aesthetic, RGB lights, racing stripes, minimal or absent bokeh, shock face, open mouth screaming, panic expression, exaggerated YouTube face, cluttered, low quality, blurry text, glossy surfaces, bright backgrounds
brand.typography_instructions: Large bold sans-serif headline text (Inter Black style), tight letter-spacing, warm golden yellow (#FFD23F) color with subtle gradient, 3D drop shadow on text (dark offset shadow), text occupies 40-50% of image area, maximum 3-5 words, text must be readable at very small sizes. Text MUST be general and sensational (e.g. 'UNFASSBAR!', 'WAHNSINN!') — NEVER specific tool names or technical terms. Text positioned on OPPOSITE side of face, OR one big centered word with face above it. Face glow color matches text color.

built_shout.description: Haupttemplate (60% der Videos) — Tutorials, Tool-Reviews, How-Tos. Background-only, kein Creator.
built_shout.background_prompt_template: YouTube thumbnail background scene, NO people, NO person, NO text, NO letters, wide angle {{scene_description}}, dark midnight navy atmosphere (#0A0E1A), {{lighting_style}}, cinematic depth of field, warm bokeh highlights, teal and orange color grade, premium tech aesthetic, matte surfaces, subtle blue LED edge glow on surfaces, empty compositional space on {{person_side}} side for person layer, 16:9 aspect ratio, 1344x768

expert_duo.description: Interview-Template (25% der Videos) — Experten-Gespraeche, Roundtables. Background-only, kein Creator.
expert_duo.background_prompt_template: YouTube thumbnail background scene, NO people, NO person, NO text, NO letters, wide angle dark premium studio interior with {{scene_description}}, deep midnight navy (#0A0E1A), {{lighting_style}}, two subtle warm spotlight areas side by side suggesting two interview positions, thin vertical electric coral (#FF6B4A) accent line in center, cinematic depth of field, premium editorial quality, 16:9 aspect ratio, 1344x768

news_flash.description: News-Template (15% der Videos) — Woechentliche Updates, Breaking News, Roundups. Background-only, kein Creator.
news_flash.background_prompt_template: YouTube thumbnail background scene, NO people, NO person, NO text, NO letters, dark midnight navy (#0A0E1A) background with {{scene_description}}, {{lighting_style}}, horizontal teal cyan (#00E5CC) accent bar at very bottom edge, urgent editorial layout, dynamic diagonal composition, premium news broadcast aesthetic, 16:9 aspect ratio, 1344x768

dark_cinematic.description: Dunkles physisches Studio, warmes Bokeh, tiefe Schatten — Standard fuer Tutorials und How-Tos
dark_cinematic.lighting_style: warm amber practical lights glowing softly in background, dramatic side-lighting, deep foreground shadows, premium studio atmosphere
dark_cinematic.prompt_suffix: wide angle dark premium tech studio interior, matte desk surfaces, premium equipment silhouettes in deep background, warm bokeh depth, cinematic Rembrandt lighting, physical sense of space and depth

illustrated_workshop.description: Warme illustrierte Werkstatt-Welt, Roboter, Schaltkreise, amber Licht — fuer KI-Agenten und Multi-Agenten-Videos
illustrated_workshop.lighting_style: warm amber and gold workshop lighting, glowing circuit elements casting soft fill light, cozy technical atmosphere
illustrated_workshop.prompt_suffix: illustrated 3D workshop environment, small robots working on glowing circuit boards and code streams, floating holographic data elements, electric circuit patterns integrated into floor and walls, digital workshop atmosphere, warm ochre and midnight color palette, premium illustrated render quality, deep background with layered depth

abstract_tech.description: Holographische Displays, fliessende Daten-Partikel, Premium-Sci-Fi — fuer Zukunfts- und Innovations-Themen
abstract_tech.lighting_style: volumetric light beams, blue and teal particle glow, translucent floating UI panels
abstract_tech.prompt_suffix: abstract premium tech environment, holographic displays showing data visualizations and flowing code particles, translucent floating UI panels, blue and teal light streams, cinematic depth of field, McKinsey/Deloitte presentation quality, sophisticated and clean

clean_minimal.description: Minimales dunkles Studio, einzelne Lichtquelle, MacBook-Aesthetik — fuer C-Level und Premium-Inhalte
clean_minimal.lighting_style: single directional spotlight, dramatic architectural shadows, Apple product launch lighting
clean_minimal.prompt_suffix: minimalist premium dark studio, single elegant MacBook Pro on matte dark surface, architectural minimalism, premium material finishes, subtle blue ambient glow, Apple keynote aesthetic, zero clutter, boardroom quality

floating_elements._rembg_rule: ALL floating element prompts MUST use plain solid light gray (#E0E0E0) background with strong subject-to-background contrast so rembg (birefnet-general) can produce a clean cutout. Never use white, never use gradients, never use shadow-on-background.

character_mascot.description: 3D isometrischer Charakter passend zum Video-Thema — wird nach Generierung per rembg freigestellt
character_mascot.background_instruction: plain solid light gray (#E0E0E0) background — uniform, no gradients, no shadows on background — required for rembg cutout
character_mascot.prompt_template: premium 3D isometric {{character_type}} character, {{character_style}}, isolated on plain solid light gray (#E0E0E0) background with no gradients and no shadow on background, glossy render with soft self-shadows only on the character, warm rim-light, subtle ambient occlusion on character only, no text, no labels, high detail, Apple App Store icon quality, professional and sovereign mood, clear crisp edges for cutout

helpful_robot.description: Freundlicher bipedaler Roboter — fuer allgemeine KI-Assistenz-Videos
helpful_robot.character_style: friendly bipedal robot with expressive rounded LED eyes, modern industrial design, warm amber highlight on chest panel, confident helpful pose with slight forward lean, clean geometric form

business_assistant.description: Professioneller Roboter im Business-Look — fuer Voice-Agent, Sekretariats-KI
business_assistant.character_style: professional robot with a subtle dark jacket silhouette, holding a digital clipboard or tablet, upright confident stance, warm screen-glow from the tablet, efficient and trustworthy demeanor

data_analyst.description: Analytischer Roboter mit Daten-Visualisierungen — fuer Analyse- und Reporting-Videos
data_analyst.character_style: analytical robot with miniature floating data charts around it, thoughtful examining pose, blue screen-glow illuminating face, one hand pointing at a data element

tech_wizard.description: Kreativer Tech-Roboter — fuer Build-Videos und innovative Projekte
tech_wizard.character_style: inventive robot in a dynamic building pose, golden sparks of light around hands, small code fragments floating nearby, excited forward-leaning stance

ui_mockup.description: Laptop oder Monitor der reale Software-UI zeigt — wird nach Generierung per rembg freigestellt
ui_mockup.background_instruction: plain solid light gray (#E0E0E0) background — uniform, no gradients, no shadow on background — required for rembg cutout
ui_mockup.prompt_template: premium floating {{mockup_type}} isolated on plain solid light gray (#E0E0E0) background with no gradients and no shadow on background, screen showing {{ui_description}}, sleek dark aluminum body with soft self-shadows only on the device, {{perspective_style}}, no background elements, product render quality, clear crisp device edges for cutout, no text outside the screen

laptop_perspective.description: MacBook-aehnlicher Laptop in 3D-Perspektive — dynamischer, mehr Tiefe
laptop_perspective.perspective_style: slight 3D perspective tilt at 30 degree angle, lid open at 110 degrees, screen facing viewer

monitor_straight.description: Standalone Monitor frontal — klarer, mehr Screen-Flaeche sichtbar
monitor_straight.perspective_style: straight-on front view, thin bezel ultrawide monitor on minimal stand

ui_mockup.ui_description_guide: Derive from a1_concept.stack[0]. Examples: 'Claude Code terminal with glowing green code output and orange asterisk logo', 'n8n workflow diagram with colorful connected nodes on dark background', 'Twilio dashboard showing call log interface', 'voice transcription waveform visualization on dark UI'

directional_arrow.description: Grosser geschwungener Pfeil als Aufmerksamkeits-Leiter — immer Beacon Yellow — wird per rembg freigestellt
directional_arrow.background_instruction: plain solid light gray (#E0E0E0) background — uniform, no gradients — required for rembg cutout
directional_arrow.prompt_template: large bold curved arrow {{direction_description}}, thick stroke weight, warm golden yellow (#FFD23F) color with subtle warm gradient on stroke, slight 3D depth with self-shadow on arrow body only, isolated on plain solid light gray (#E0E0E0) background with no other elements and no shadow on background, bold graphic clarity, clean crisp edges for cutout, no text

directions.pointing_right: curving from upper-left to right, tip pointing rightward
directions.pointing_left: curving from upper-right to left, tip pointing leftward
directions.pointing_down_left: curving from upper-right downward, tip pointing to lower-left
directions.pointing_down_right: curving from upper-left downward, tip pointing to lower-right

directional_arrow.usage_rule: Arrow always points FROM the headline text TOWARD the emphasized element (person, mockup, or mascot). Never use two arrows in one thumbnail.

facial_expressions._note: Used for VIDEO FRAME SELECTION GUIDANCE only — NOT for Gemini image generation. Creator always comes from real video footage via rembg.

sovereign_wonder.prompt_phrase: expression of sovereign wonder, slightly raised eyebrows, genuine fascination, subtle closed-mouth amazement, eyes wide with intellectual curiosity

focused_gaze.prompt_phrase: focused determined gaze, slight concentration, looking at camera with quiet confidence and expertise

slight_smile.description: Fuer Erfolgsberichte, 'So habe ich X gebaut'
slight_smile.prompt_phrase: subtle warm smile, confident and approachable, eyes engaged and friendly, radiating quiet satisfaction

curious_skeptical.prompt_phrase: one eyebrow slightly raised, curious and analytical expression, hint of skepticism, evaluating

creator_style._note: Frame selection reference only — NOT used for Gemini image generation. Creator always comes from real video footage.
creator_style.default_description: a confident European man in his early 30s with short dark brown hair and light stubble

outfit_options.navy: dark navy mock-neck pullover, athletic fit, premium material
outfit_options.deep_slate: deep slate grey crewneck pullover, tailored fit, matte fabric
outfit_options.forest_olive: muted forest green mock-neck pullover, athletic fit, no logos

creator_style.accessory: dark-dialed minimalist watch on left wrist
creator_style.forbidden: no logos, no prints, no hoodies, no white clothing, no black clothing

approach_a_overlay.description: Bild ohne Text generieren, Text separat drueberlegen (empfohlen fuer wichtige Thumbnails)
approach_a_overlay.instructions: Generate the image WITHOUT any text. Add headline text afterwards using Canva, Figma, or an HTML overlay with: font Inter Black 900, color #FFD23F, text-shadow 0 4-6px 20-30px rgba(0,0,0,0.8) + 3D offset 3px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.4), tracking -0.02em, 100-130pt

approach_b_in_prompt.description: Text direkt im Prompt angeben (schneller, aber weniger kontrollierbar)
approach_b_in_prompt.instructions: Include the exact text in the prompt. Add to prompt: 'with large bold readable text saying exactly: [TEXT]'. May require multiple generations for clean results.

prompt_composition.floating_element_formula: [FLOATING_ELEMENTS.<type>.prompt_template with filled {{variables}}] — each element generated SEPARATELY on plain gray (#E0E0E0) background, then rembg cutout
background_variables: {{person_side}} — 'left' or 'right' based on intended person placement
floating_element_variables: {{character_type}} — One of: helpful_robot, business_assistant, data_analyst, tech_wizard

curl_template: curl -s -X POST "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-2.5-flash-image:generateContent?key=${GOOGLE_API_KEY}" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"contents": [{"parts": [{"text": "PROMPT_HERE"}]}], "generationConfig": {"responseModalities": ["TEXT", "IMAGE"], "temperature": 1, "topK": 40, "topP": 0.95}}' | jq -r '.candidates[0].content.parts[] | select(.inline_data) | .inline_data.data' | base64 -d > OUTPUT_FILE.png
